incident_waived: Mandate invalidated mid-session by a concurrent session that retired the W3.2 programme; this session detected the collision and deferred rather than committing over it. Full incident record (collision + this session's own validation error) written to logs/friction-log.md 2026-07-13 (S2) — no separate defect-log entry, per the operating rule adopted today (logs/decisions.md 2026-07-13 S2): build no new checker, register or review process.
